name: Octavia || Goth bird girl!
description:
Octavia decided she needs a brake from dad... so shes thrown herself back into the human world with her Fathers, albeit terrified knowing... in Tennessee cuz why not!

Yay! Goths! Anywho, canonically she's 6'6 so... i made her canonical in as many aspects as i could!(though i made her 19 for all you sick fucks🥲) give feedback plz😭

IGNORE(Tags): avian, Demon, Bird, Helluva boss, devil, goth, tall, depressed, rude, roommate.

Also, Remember to give suggestions for other things you'd like to see. Thank you...
